data.title: Erdene reveals $25M private placement deal.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.7%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The economy has also seen a notable increase in job growth, with a total of 250,000 new jobs being added last month. This surge in employment opportunities has positively impacted various sectors, including manufacturing, technology, and healthcare. Additionally, the stock market has responded favorably to these trends, with the main indexes experiencing a notable uptick. Experts attribute this economic growth to various factors, including increased consumer spending, government policies, and overall market confidence. Despite these positive indicators, some concerns remain about inflation rates and wage stagnation. It will be crucial to monitor these factors closely in the coming months.

data.title: Nio has the most upside potential among Chinese EV stocks, with a potential increase of 65.29% based on current price and consensus target. Li Auto and XPeng follow with 49.00% and 15.91% upside respectively.
data.description: Three of the largest U.S.-listed Chinese electric vehicle companies, NIO Inc. (NYSE: NIO), Li Auto Inc. (NASDAQ: LI), and XPeng, Inc. (NYSE: XPEV), are currently trading below their consensus price targets. This presents a favorable buying opportunity as per the latest analyst data. As of January 26, 2026, the current prices and consensus targets for these companies are as follows: NIO ($4.61, $7.62 with +65.29% potential upside), Li Auto ($16.94, $25.24 with +49.00% potential upside), and XPeng ($18.79, $21.78 with +15.91% potential upside). NIO stands out with the highest potential upside due to its undervalued position. Investors may consider NIO as a strong buy given its significant room for growth compared to the other two competitors. For more detailed insights, check out the full story.

data.title: Georgia Power restores power to 214,000+ customers after Winter Storm Fern; crews target Clayton and Cornelia.
data.description: Over 214,000 customers have had their service restored by Georgia Power, with crews focusing on areas like Clayton and Cornelia most severely affected. The company's generation fleet is ready to cope with the electricity demand during the extreme cold weather expected this week.

data.title: Stocks including AMD, Astera, Oklo, Rocket Lab, Tesla plummeted sharply on Monday. The Federal Reserve's two-day meeting begins Tuesday.
data.description: Shares of several companies including AMD, Astera, Oklo, Rocket Lab, and Tesla experienced significant declines in trading on Monday. The Federal Reserve's two-day meeting is set to commence on Tuesday. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Dow Jones rises despite Trump's tariff threats on Canada. Michael Burry boosts GameStop, Tesla dips.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw an increase despite President Trump's mention of potential tariffs on Canada. Michael Burry made a significant impact on GameStop's stock while Tesla experienced a downturn. The stock market showed resilience despite potential political challenges. The news highlights the Dow Jones' positive movement even with external uncertainties, indicating investor confidence. Michael Burry's actions contributed to GameStop's performance, contrasting with Tesla's decline. The dynamics of the stock market present opportunities and risks for investors, underlining the importance of staying informed and adaptable in response to market fluctuations.

data.title: Quiddity Engineering expands with new office in Waco, Texas - showcasing steady growth within the state.
data.description: Quiddity Engineering, a prominent design firm ranked among the Engineering News-Record Top 500, recently inaugurated a new office in Waco, Texas on January 26, 2026. This expansion signifies the company's dedication to incremental and sustainable progress, further solidifying its footprint in the state.

data.title: Trump plans to hike tariffs to 25% on South Korean goods, including cars, due to slow trade deal ratification.
data.description: The President of the United States has issued a warning to South Korea regarding a potential tariff hike on its exports, particularly cars, due to frustrations over the country's delayed approval of a trade agreement. President Trump's threat aims to push South Korea to expedite the ratification process. The tariff increase could significantly impact South Korean exports and trade relations between the two countries.

data.title: Bristow Group closes $500M notes offering and extends ABL facility.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, Bristow Group Inc. completed a private offering of $500 million in 6.750% senior secured notes due 2033. The offering involved the issuance of the notes.

data.title: Real-world data shows 84% survival of children with SR-aGvHD after 28 days of Ryoncil® treatment. Mesoblast Limited provided an update on the use of Ryoncil® since its commercial availability in March 2025, approved for children 2 months and older with SR-aGvHD. Ryoncil® is the first MSC product approved by the FDA for any indication.
data.description: In New York on Jan. 26, 2026, Mesoblast Limited (Nasdaq:MESO; ASX:MSB), a global leader in allogeneic cellular medicines for inflammatory diseases, shared an update on the use of Ryoncil ® (remestemcel-L-rknd). The product has been commercially available since March 2025 for the approved label in children aged 2 months and older who have steroid-refractory acute graft-versus-host disease (SR-aGvHD). Notably, Ryoncil ® is the first mesenchymal stromal cell (MSC) product to receive approval from the U.S. Food & Drug Administration (FDA) for any indication.

data.title: Tricia A. Asaro of Greenberg Traurig recognized on City & State's '2026 Trailblazers in Healthcare' list.
data.description: Albany, New York, January 26, 2026 - Tricia A. Asaro, a Shareholder at Greenberg Traurig, LLP, has been honored on City & State's "2026 Trailblazers in Healthcare" roster. As an expert in transactions related to managed care organizations, Asaro has carved a niche for herself as a leading figure in this field. City & State highlights her significant contributions to the healthcare sector.

data.title: Northeast Bank declared $20.7M net income, $2.47/share for Q4 2025; $43.3M net income, $5.14/share for H1 2025.
data.description: In Portland, Maine, as of January 26, 2026, Northeast Bank (NASDAQ: NBN), headquartered in Maine, revealed a net income of $20.7 million, equaling $2.47 per diluted common share, in the final quarter of 2025. This marks a decrease from the previous year's final quarter, when net income was $22.4 million, or $2.74 per diluted common share, by December 31, 2024. For the six months leading up to December 31, 2025, the bank reported a net income of $43.3 million, translating to $5.14 per diluted common share. This is a rise from the $39.5 million net income, or $4.85 per diluted common share, reported in the same six-month period in 2024.

data.title: TE Connectivity prices $750 million senior notes offerings; subsidiary prices $200 million of 4.500% senior notes.
data.description: In Galway, Ireland, on January 26, 2026, TE Connectivity plc (NYSE: TEL) disclosed that its indirect wholly-owned subsidiary, Tyco Electronics Group S.A. ("TEGSA"), has set the offering price for $200 million aggregate principal amount of its 4.500% senior notes...
